steps.t: Troll-stone can be found throughout the Brown Lands, in the desolation of the Entwives' gardens, and at the Stone-hole, north of Gnarlstump's camp. Gn…
Gnarlstump is at his camp near the desolation of the Entwives' gardens in the Brown Lands. You should bring the troll-stone you collected to Gnarlstum…
